description: Canonical repository catalog for Falcone product services after the service-code layout restructure. Release entries are the only images published by .github/workflows/release-images.yml; non-release entries document evidence roots without claiming chart or image release status.

interServiceCalls: dispatches selected route-map entries to packages/provisioning-orchestrator actions
dispatches scheduling routes to packages/scheduling-engine actions
dispatches webhook routes to packages/webhook-engine actions
loads console/helper modules from apps/control-plane-executor
calls Keycloak, PostgreSQL, Kafka, OpenBao/Vault, SeaweedFS S3, and Knative through runtime handlers
serves data-plane HTTP routes through apps/control-plane-executor/src/runtime/server.mjs
executes PostgreSQL, Mongo/FerretDB, Kafka, functions, flows, MCP, embedding, and LLM operations through runtime executors
uses packages/adapters for provider-specific request planning
uses packages/internal-contracts for transport security and public route contracts
uses Temporal when flow execution is configured

services.language: TypeScript React SPA plus Node.js static server
interServiceCalls: serves the built SPA from apps/web-console/dist
reverse-proxies same-origin /v1 requests to the APISIX gateway via GATEWAY_UPSTREAM
the SPA consumes the control-plane public API through apps/web-console/src/services
receives function source through FN_SRC for Knative-created function services
passes trusted tenant/workspace/function context from control-plane headers to user code

services.language: TypeScript compiled to CommonJS for Temporal worker runtime
interServiceCalls: connects to Temporal using TEMPORAL_ADDRESS
loads selected control-plane executor runtime modules for data and LLM activities
uses packages/webhook-engine SSRF guards for HTTP activities
uses PostgreSQL for workspace data and flow definition loading
serves first-party MCP JSON-RPC over HTTP
delegates MCP message handling to apps/control-plane-executor MCP modules
calls the Falcone control-plane API through FALCONE_API_BASE_URL when tools need REST parity

services.reason: Contains reusable CDC bridge code and a candidate Dockerfile, but it is not in the published release-image matrix and has no release chart image value.
Reusable CDC bridge package; not in the release-image matrix and not represented as a released chart component.
Realtime gateway package and tests exist, but the current release set does not publish a realtime-gateway image.
Workspace docs actions are packaged for control-plane consumption; they are not a standalone released image.

legacyNonDeployable.reason: Legacy console package retained for source compatibility only; it is not in the release-image matrix and must not be treated as a deployed service.
